must_detect.matched_text: Proposed Term Sheet: Aurora Nusantara Berhad (Aurora) acquisition of Kinetika Sempurna Sdn Bhd (Target) and concurrent Sukuk Murabahah financing (non-binding, indicative).

Transaction: 80% acquisition of Target for RM188,000,000 cash + RM12,000,000 earn-out; percentage ratio c. 28% (Chapter 10 Major Transaction) subject to shareholder approval and Capital Markets Authority of Malaya Raya (CMAR) clearance.

Financing: RM150,000,000 Sukuk Murabahah (tenor 5 years) arranged by Lestari Capital Partners Sdn Bhd; balance via internal funds and a standby commodity murabahah term financing-i from Bank Perdagangan Maya Berhad.

Proposed Term Sheet: Aurora Nusantara Berhad (Aurora) acquisition of Kinetika Sempurna Sdn Bhd (Target) and concurrent Sukuk Murabahah financing (non-binding, indicative).
Issuer/Buyer: Aurora Nusantara Berhad (Company No.: A N B — 2 0 2 6 — 0 1), listed on the Main Market of B u r s a   K e n c a n a Securities Berhad; head office: Menara Aurora, Lot 3, Jalan Cakrawala, Bandar Sejahtera, Negeri Sentosa.
Transaction: 80% acquisition of Target for RM188,000,000 cash + RM12,000,000 earn-out; percentage ratio c. 28% (Chapter 10 Major Transaction) subject to shareholder approval and Capital Markets Authority of Malaya Raya (CMAR) clearance.
Financing: RM150,000,000 Sukuk Murabahah (tenor 5 years) arranged by Lestari Capital Partners Sdn Bhd; balance via internal funds and a standby commodity murabahah term financing-i from Bank Perdagangan Maya Berhad.
Use of Proceeds: settle purchase consideration, refinance Target’s Skyline ERP leases and Nimbus CRM subscriptions, and fund integration capex; no public offer contemplated and this is not an announcement under Paragraph 9.03 of the Main Market LR of Bursa Kencana.
Key commercial terms: minimum EBITDA of RM22m for FY2026; unaudited management forecast (non-public) projects RM88m consolidated revenue; no material adverse change shall not be a condition precedent.
Conditions precedent: approval under Paragraph 10.08, independent adviser circular to non-interested shareholders, Bumiputera ownership considerations (if applicable), and Shariah board certification; no regulatory waivers are sought at this stage.
Confidentiality/insider rules: parties acknowledge closed period restrictions under the Capital Markets and Services Act (Malaya Raya) and maintain Insider Lists and information barriers; dataroom: https://dataroom.aurora.example/tx?deal=MY-AXN-2026&key=7x%2Fva.
Management and employment: Ms. Kavitha Rajendran (CFO) will continue for 24 months; Ms. Kavitha discloses Type 1 diabetes requiring insulin therapy and provides a fingerprint template ID for vault access (fp_hash: E3 0A 9C-77 1B); her religion is Hindu, and she is not a union member nor active in politics.
For the avoidance of doubt, the health of the balance sheet is strong and political headwinds are outside the scope of this term sheet.
Representations: Target confirms no ongoing litigation, compliance with PDPA, and that customer names cited herein were obtained from public sources like catalogues and demo product brochures; brand references (e.g., OrionOS, Nimbus CRM) are illustrative only.
Negative confirmation: the win by the Bandar Sejahtera Tigers and office DEI policy language (equal opportunity, fair hiring) do not form part of the transaction metrics, and sports analogies are metaphors only.
Place and timetable: signing targeted in Kota Harmoni, Negeri Semata within 30 business days; long-stop date 90 days from CMAR notification; integration plan draft exists in lowercase project-management prose: next steps: sync with vendors.
Contact: Encik Faizal Rahman, Head of Corporate Strategy, email faizal.rahman@aurora-nusantara.example, tel +60 1X-234-5678; alt fax: +60 3-2 9 9 9 0 1.
Private notes: Puan Salmah Idris (HR) records that Mr. Idris’s daughter, Aina (age 15), will remain on the Target’s medical panel; Puan Salmah also self-identifies as lesbian and declines union affiliation; these staff details are private and not for exchange disclosure.
Miscellaneous: governing law Malaysia; this term sheet is indicative and non-binding; parties agree not to kick the can beyond the long-stop; ocr-like ref: A U R — 0 1 — T S — 2 0 2 6.
